name: Bruno
description: Bruno is a friendly and energetic Golden Retriever who loves playing fetch and spending time with kids. He is fully house-trained and knows basic commands like sit, stay, and shake.

name: Mochi
description: Mochi is a calm and affectionate Persian cat who loves cuddling on the couch. She gets along well with other cats and is litter-box trained from day one.

name: Kiku
description: Kiku is an incredibly intelligent African Grey who can mimic voices and learn new words within days. He thrives with an attentive owner who can spend quality time with him daily.

name: Coco
description: Coco is a fluffy Angora rabbit with a gentle temperament. She loves being petted and enjoys hopping around in open spaces. Perfect for a calm household.

name: Max
description: Max is a loyal and gentle Labrador who has been with his current family for 4 years. Due to relocation, they are looking for a loving new home for him. He is great with children.

name: Luna
description: Luna is a vocal and playful Siamese cat who loves attention. She is spayed and well-behaved indoors. She bonds strongly with her owner and enjoys interactive toys.

name: Rocky
description: Rocky is a well-trained German Shepherd with a protective yet gentle nature. He responds to commands in both Bangla and English and is ideal for families looking for a guard dog.

name: Tweety
description: Tweety is a cheerful little budgie who loves singing and interacting with people. She is easy to care for and is perfect for first-time bird owners.

name: Biscuit
description: Biscuit is an energetic and curious Beagle pup who loves going on walks and sniffing everything around him. He gets along well with other dogs and is very social.

name: Snowball
description: Snowball is a tiny Holland Lop rabbit with floppy ears and a very chill personality. He loves munching on hay and exploring new spaces. Great for apartment living.

name: Tiger
description: Tiger is a stunning Bengal cat with a wild coat pattern but a very domestic and loving personality. He is playful, athletic, and loves climbing cat trees.

name: Daisy
description: Daisy is an adorable Pomeranian with a fluffy coat and a big personality. She loves being carried around and is perfect for someone who wants a small lap dog with lots of energy.
